scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/core && npm run lint --workspace=packages/cli && npm run lint --workspace=packages/server && npm run lint --workspace=packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/core && npm run test --workspace=packages/cli && npm run test --workspace=packages/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli && npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/web
